work_unit: autonomous-loop.sh header doc correction (ESE-M02 derived fix)

Pure comment/code contradiction misleads future maintainers about the actual bounding mechanism.
action: Replace misleading header line 14 with accurate description: cloudcli claude lacks --max-iterations; bounding relies on single-prompt + while-reopen-naturally-limits-each-round semantics. Single-file edit, no behavior change.
